name: Restart Resume
description: On gateway start, if a copied restart sentinel exists, post a 'Gateway successfully restarted' message via send-to-channel.sh to trigger a fresh agent turn.

guildId.description: Discord guild id used by send-to-channel.sh

copiedSentinelPath.description: Path to the copied restart sentinel created by ExecStartPre

sendScriptPath.description: Script used to send a message into the correct session for a channel

healthTimeoutMs.description: How long to wait for `openclaw health --json` to succeed before giving up

healthPollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval while waiting for health
